title: Stainless Steel Easy Turn & Release with Indicator – Grade 304 Privacy Lock for Bathroom Doors (Polished Stainless Steel, 52x5mm)
features: Grade 304 Steel: High corrosion resistance for long-term use
Indicator Feature: Red/green window shows room occupancy
Smooth Thumbturn: Comfortable grip and easy rotation
Brushed Finish: Fingerprint-resistant and modern in style
Ideal for Bathrooms: Designed for privacy and safety
All Fixings Included: Quick and easy installation
description: Upgrade your interior door hardware with the Kooples Hardware Stainless Steel Easy Turn & Release with Indicator, crafted from high-grade 304 stainless steel for superior corrosion resistance and long-term durability. Ideal for bathrooms, en-suites, and other private areas, this privacy set combines clear visual indication with user-friendly operation. The set includes an internal thumbturn for easy locking and a red/green indicator on the external side to show room occupancy at a glance. With a sleek, brushed stainless steel finish, it complements both modern and traditional interiors while resisting fingerprints and surface wear. Built with Grade 304 stainless steel, this lock is especially suited for humid or high-use environments. It fits most standard UK internal doors and can be installed with a standard bathroom mortice or rack bolt (sold separately). All necessary fixings are included, and the installation process is quick and simple for DIYers or professional fitters. Whether you're upgrading old fittings or completing a new project, this Easy Turn & Release set offers reliable privacy, smooth operation, and a premium aesthetic finish that stands up to everyday use.
